Title: Love for Love's Sake
Actors: Lee Tae-Vin, Joo-wan Cha, Ko Gun-Han
Plot: 29-year-old Tae Myung Ha experiences a baffling twist of fate when he finds himself transported into a video game, inhabiting the body of a teenager. His sole mission is to bring happiness to a character named Cha Yeo Woon - or fa...
